flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwest Kansas Technical College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.5k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Northwest Kansas Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (76.9% vs 86.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Kansas Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
